Video.summary: A group of wagons begins to run out of food and water after becoming trapped in a hot desert.
Video.title: How Death Valley Got Its Name

Image.alt: How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name

Video.summary: A miner is encouraged by a dance-hall girl to study law after he loses an arm in a shooting fracas.
Video.title: Self-Made Man

Video.summary: The new schoolteacher tames her unruly classroom by demonstrating her skills with a six shooter.
Video.title: Dear Teacher

Video.summary: A woman in love with a fire chief has a rival: a flashy fire engine.
Video.title: Little Papeete

Video.summary: Jimmy Dayton hopes to win the hand of a gold-digging dance girl.
Video.title: Jimmy Dayton's Treasure

Video.summary: An engineer negotiates a peace treaty with Natives refusing to let a railroad cross their lands.
Video.title: Husband Pro-Tem

Video.summary: A member of the Laguna tribe refuses to return a venerated portrait to neighboring braves.
Video.title: The Saint's Portrait

Video.summary: A teacher stages a holdup as a joke but decides to make a career of it.
Video.title: Black Bart The PO8

Video.summary: A tenderfoot becomes a swamper with the Big Team to prove his worth to the girl he loves.
Video.title: The Big Team Rolls

Video.summary: Depositing his gold in San Francisco, a prospector encounters the temptations of the big city.
Video.title: Riggs and Riggs

Video.summary: A crystal ball sends the seventh daughter of a seventh daughter West to seek her fortune.
Video.title: The Crystal Gazer

Video.summary: A quiet dressmaker for the dance hall girls in a Western mining camp is discovered to be Tiger Lil.
Video.title: The Little Dressmaker of Bodie

Video.summary: A miner turned lawyer falls in love.
Video.title: Whirlwind Courtship

Video.summary: Blind and bitter Susie witnesses a stage robbery and her heightened senses play a key role.
Video.title: Sixth Sense

Video.summary: The romance of young lovers is threatened by their feuding families.
Video.title: Halfway Girl

Video.summary: Saloonkeeper Shanghai Kelly kidnaps crewmen for understaffed ships.
Video.title: Shanghai Kelly's Birthday Party

Video.summary: The story of Sacajawea, the Native woman who helped explorers Lewis and Clark.
Video.title: The Girl Who Walked the West

Image.alt: The Girl Who Walked the West
The Girl Who Walked the West
The Girl Who Walked the West
The Girl Who Walked the West
The Girl Who Walked the West
The Girl Who Walked the West
The Girl Who Walked the West
The Girl Who Walked the West
The Girl Who Walked the West

Video.summary: Scout Kit Carson competes with a trapper for the hand of a Native woman.
Video.title: Spring Rendezvous

Video.summary: A wife drives a stagecoach to transport silver to Hillsboro after bandits attack her husband.
Video.title: The Saga of Sadie Orchard

Video.summary: A man fights an oyster boat captain.
Video.title: Prince of the Oyster Pirates

Video.summary: Two prospectors pull a hoax on a banker who wants their mine.
Video.title: The Great Diamond Mines

Video.summary: Impoverished homesteader Aaron makes a discovery with the potential to earn a fortune.
Video.title: Green Is the Color of Gold

Image.alt: Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold

Video.summary: A settler must prove an inheritance.
Video.title: The Pieces of the Puzzle

Video.summary: A Dakota wife left on her own becomes the unwilling servant of two opportunistic highwaymen.
Video.title: The Sage Hen

Video.summary: A woman's love inspires an aspiring preacher to stand up to a bully.
Video.title: The Other Cheek

Video.summary: A former outlaw takes the unenviable job of sheriff in a lawless town, and old habits die hard.
Video.title: A Restless Man

Video.summary: Renegade Natives led by a white man named Clay threaten the residents of a decommissioned fort.
Video.title: Long Night at Fort Lonely

Video.summary: A frontier couple battle Natives, outlaws and a government-issued land grant to save their ranch.
Video.title: Here Stands Bailey

Video.summary: Best friends recently out of the U.S. Army use a card game to determine a decision about marriage.
Video.title: A Full House

Video.summary: Two outlaws devise a mining operation and finance it with stolen bullion.
Video.title: How to Beat a Badman

Video.summary: George Parker's friend Michael encourages his rebellious ways and suggests he even change his name.
Video.title: Drop Out

Video.summary: Lucia Darling moves to Montana to start a school but faces many challenges.
Video.title: Lucia Darling and the Ostrich

Video.summary: A convict is released from prison, but not released from his past.
Video.title: Tracy's Triumph

Video.summary: A blue-eyed goat named Billy and a mother's ability to bake biscuits help abandoned family members.
Video.title: Biscuits and Billy the Kid

Video.summary: A physician courts disaster by aiding one of two feuding Natives.
Video.title: The Lady Doctor

Video.summary: A trouble-shooter must establish a mail route in bandit country.
Video.title: The King of Uvalde Road

Video.summary: A young man hunts for gold, hoping to impress his girl so she'll accept his proposal.
Video.title: The Mezcla Man

Video.summary: Wagon master Caleb must bring his wayward son Johnny to justice after the boy goes too far.
Video.title: A Simple Question of Justice

Video.summary: Inspector Wesley Hull is determined to discover how postmaster Jack Reardon can sell so many stamps.
Video.title: The Biggest Little Post Office in the World

Image.alt: The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World

Video.summary: Natives reject Christianity in this biographical tale of missionary priest Jean Baptiste Lamy.
Video.title: Saint of Travelers

Video.summary: A loveless woman baker decides to leave, causing her town to lose its only pie supplier.
Video.title: The Solid Gold Pie

Video.summary: John Clum is given a task of turning a group of Apache men into a force that aids the U.S. Calvary.
Video.title: Clum's Constabulary

Video.summary: Gold fever takes hold when Nellie learns that nuggets just lay on the ground in a remote area.
Video.title: The Angel of Tombstone
